response.step_by_step_log: 1. 00:00-02:26: Identified 'Yumeiro Festival' performed by Sakura Miko and Nakiri Ayame via OCR. Searched '夢色フェスティバル さくらみこ lyrics'. Found full lyrics on UtaTen and Vocaloid Lyrics Wiki. 2. 02:26-02:40: Identified as transition/stage setup; no vocal music. 3. 02:40-04:59: Identified 'Hazukashiika Seishunwa' by Haruko Nagaya. Performers are Sakura Miko, Nakiri Ayame, Ookami Mio, Oozora Subaru. Searched '恥ずかしがりや青春 長屋晴子 lyrics' (corrected to actual title '恥ずかしいか青春は'). Found full lyrics on UtaTen, ORICON NEWS, and Uta-Net.
response.global_summary: A video featuring a musical performance with two songs. The first song, 'Yumeiro Festival', is performed by Sakura Miko and Nakiri Ayame. After a brief stage transition, the second song, 'Hazukashiika Seishunwa', is performed by Sakura Miko, Nakiri Ayame, Ookami Mio, and Oozora Subaru.

scenes.description: Sakura Miko and Nakiri Ayame perform the song 'Yumeiro Festival' on a decorated stage. The text on-screen confirms the song title.

scenes.description: Stage transition sequence with light effects, no vocal music playing.
Sakura Miko, Nakiri Ayame, Ookami Mio, and Oozora Subaru perform the song 'Hazukashiika Seishunwa'. The lyrics/music are credited to Haruko Nagaya.
scenes.performer_in_video: Sakura Miko, Nakiri Ayame, Ookami Mio, Oozora Subaru, original_language:
